aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE284_8se38w3c`
   - **Driver**: `radiator_valve`
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Shenzen New Green Energy Technologies Co Ltd](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)
   - **Status**: Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
1. **TS0003 (_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp)**
   - **Driver**: `switch_3gang`
   - **Issue**: [Bug: Sub-capability Flow cards unlinked](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170)
   - **Status**: Open

2. **Bseed E-touch Series Zigbee 1-Gang**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3002_jn2x20tg`
   - **Driver**: `switch_4gang`
   - **Issue**: [Closed](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/171)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR**: [#10](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)

2. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR**: [#45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status**: Closed (merged)

3. **Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor**
   - **PR**: [#46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)

4. **Support for Tuya PIR Sensor TS0202**
   - **PR**: [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)

5. **Added TS110E Driver**
   - **PR**: [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`
   - **Status**: Open

6. **Added 3 New Devices**
   - **PR**: [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status**: Open

7. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR**: [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`
   - **Status**: Open

8. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR**: [#1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_dapwryy7`
   - **Status**: Open

9. **Add Fingerprint "_TZE204_bjzrowv2"**
   - **PR**: [#1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`
   - **Status**: Open

---

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, highlighting active issues, existing device support, and ongoing pull requests that may enhance functionality.
